column1: # All items available in the game world with volumetric physics data
#   name              - Display name shown to player
#   description       - Short description of the item
#   value             - Base trade value in credits
#   volume_liters     - Physical volume in liters (for volumetric cargo)
#   requirements      - Skill requirements (skill:level pairs separated by colons)
#   stats             - Stat modifiers (stat:value pairs separated by colons)
#   effects           - Applied effects (effect:value pairs separated by colons)
#   stackable         - Whether item stacks in inventory (true/false)
